name: promptrail-codex-router
description: Automatically selects one of six Codex reasoning-effort levels while preserving ChatGPT subscription billing. Learn more at https://www.promptrail.ai/plugins

interface.longDescription: Classifies each Codex prompt into one of six reasoning levels. The local proxy keeps OpenAI authentication on the user's machine and uses the user's ChatGPT subscription. Learn more at https://www.promptrail.ai/plugins
defaultPrompt: How much time and money do I save by using PromptRail?
